itemListElement.reviewBody: I feel incredibly fortunate to have my child enrolled at The Maurya School. It's not just about being the best school in Palam Vihar; it's about the unparalleled commitment to fostering a love for learning. The teachers go above and beyond to create a stimulating environment, and the results are evident in my child's enthusiasm and academic progress. Truly a top-notch institution.

Without a doubt, The Maurya School is the epitome of excellence in education. As a parent, I can confidently say that it truly lives up to its reputation as the top school in Palam Vihar. The dedication of the teachers, the state-of-the-art facilities, and the comprehensive approach to learning make this school the best choice for holistic development. My child's growth and achievements here have been truly remarkable.

In India, the school was worshiped like a temple. Teacher was considered as Guru. Here the character of the children was built. But black British people like you have made it a business where instead of studying, the focus is on how to extract money from the parents. Maybe some parents are concerned about my teaching method, but is it legally and morally right to start a teacher's notice period without telling and without giving any reason?? And as far as studies are concerned, your 7th class children did not even know how to turn on UPS, this shows what is the condition of education. More than half of the computers in your computer lab are always faulty, no action is taken even after speaking many times. And when the exams come, the teacher is blamed as to why he didn't do all this earlier. More than half of all the reviews are fake reviews of your own staff. And as far as the teacher is concerned, apart from some old teachers, no teacher is considered as anything. And new teachers are forced to buy your meditation courses.
And if it was a lie, then all the negative reviews of the parents would not have happened and no teacher would have left in between. Everyone is not ready to take responsibility at your place, they put the blame on their juniors. You speak with love as long as you need.
As you have seen my review, have you not seen the reviews of other parents who send their children to such expensive schools and give such reviews that the principal is being called arrogant, does not have the manners to speak to parents, asks for donations etc. Don't you think that if they are all wrong then they should also be answered, how strange is it that most of the parents feel the same thing about the school?

Excellent school! Right from the best infrastructure, well qualified teachers and staff & the best management, this school is one of the best for your child's overall growth and development. Each and every child is given an encouraging environment to grow and excel in academic as well as cultural activities and sports. Keep up the good work!👍🏻

Very good school. The school has a very good balance between academic and non academic activities. The quality of teaching is impeccable; the teachers are well qualified and trained. The school's infrastructure is top-notch. The management is very responsive and takes immediate action on parent's feedback.
Would definitely recommend this school based on my child's holistic development. It is a place where each child is given equal importance.
